post.summary: Registers a new user account using the specified registration details.
post.description:
This method creates a new user account with the provided credentials. The
            registration may fail if the user name or email address is already in use, or if the password does not meet
            the required criteria. The response does not include detailed error information; for more granular feedback,
            consider extending the response model.

requestBody.description:
An object containing the user registration information, including user name, email address, and password.
            Cannot be null.

post.summary: Books the specified seat selection for the event and returns the identifiers of the booked seats.

requestBody.description: The booking request containing event and seat selection details. Cannot be null.

get.summary: Retrieves the list of seat prices for the specified event.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the event for which to retrieve seat prices.

get.summary: Retrieves the list of zone prices for the specified event.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the event for which to retrieve zone prices.

get.summary: Retrieves the suite-level catalog as a collection of list items.

post.summary: Creates a new suite level using the specified request data.
post.description:
Returns a 400 Bad Request response if the request model is invalid, or a 422
            Unprocessable Entity response if the suite level could not be created.

requestBody.description: The request object containing the details required to create the suite level. Cannot be null.

put.summary: Updates the suite level with the specified details.
put.description:
Returns a 400 Bad Request response if the request model is invalid, or a 422
            Unprocessable Entity response if the update operation fails.

requestBody.description:
An object containing the updated suite level information. Must not be null and must satisfy all model
            validation requirements.

delete.summary: Deletes the suite level with the specified identifier.

parameters.name: suiteLevelId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the suite level to delete.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of all available test suites.

post.summary: Creates a new suite based on the specified request data.

requestBody.description: The details of the suite to create. Must not be null and must satisfy all model validation requirements.

put.summary: Updates an existing suite with the specified details.

requestBody.description:
The request object containing the updated suite information. Must not be null and must satisfy all
            validation requirements.

get.summary: Retrieves the details of a suite with the specified identifier.

parameters.name: suiteId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the suite to retrieve.

delete.summary: Deletes the suite with the specified identifier.

parameters.name: suiteId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the suite to delete.

get.summary: Retrieves a collection of venue catalog items for use in selection lists or dropdowns.
get.description:
Use this endpoint to obtain a list of venues formatted for display in UI components
            such as dropdowns. The returned items typically include venue identifiers and display names.
